Option Contract Rater

Grade a single options contract on spread quality, delta, and theta. Quotes refreshed daily — 35 tickers available.

Pick a ticker, then a call or put. We grade the bid-ask spread and Greeks (delta/theta) so you can spot a good contract from a poor one. Underlying direction is up to you.

Data: Yahoo Finance option chain, fetched server-side at build time. Built May 3, 2026, 7:33 PM (NY). Greeks computed locally with Black-Scholes. For information only — not investment advice.
